case_title: THE CADLE COMPANY VS. CIRCO G. BUONOCORE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT, NOTICE WAS SERVED ON 5/28/03. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CADLE COMPANY

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CADLE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BUONOCORE, CIRCO G. BOUNOCORE, CORINE R. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CADLE COMPANY SERVED MAY-27-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUONOCORE, CIRCO G.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ANY TIME IF ON MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.

NTC OF MOTION BY PLNTF THE CADLE CO TO COMPEL DEFNTS CIRCO BUONOCORE RESPOND TO POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES; NTC TO REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS; DECLARATION OF JAMES R KNOLES, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CADLE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CADLE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUONOCORE, CIRCO G. BOUNOCORE, CORINE R. $4,806.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,205.25 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,131.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
